overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city district dominated by Arasaka corporate architecture. The scene features heavy red neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and atmospheric fog, transitioning from open plazas to covered walkways and underground tunnels.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with Arasaka building entrance

events.description: camera turns left from facing the Arasaka building to facing the street
moving from open plaza into covered sidewalk area alongside the road

agents.ego_description: walking through the Arasaka plaza and turning onto the street, observing the corporate architecture and wet reflective pavement

entered.detail: large corporate building with illuminated Arasaka logo and red neon base lighting
reflective wet concrete surface mirroring the red neon lights
tall street lamp with bright white light
small signpost near the street corner
modern building with dark glass facade on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the Arasaka corporate plaza at night, dominated by the glowing red logo of the building. The camera turns left from the building facade onto the street, transitioning from the open plaza to a covered sidewalk. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights, and a modern glass building lines the right side of the empty street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside multi-lane road

events.description: passing under an overhead pedestrian bridge or structure that temporarily blocks the sky view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to the empty multi-lane road, approaching the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: low concrete divider separating sidewalk from the road
concrete overpass or bridge structure crossing above the street
distant red glow indicating the tunnel entrance ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath overpasses, with a glass commercial building now closer on the right. The street is empty and the atmosphere is hazy. The camera passes under overhead structures as it approaches a distant red-lit tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with holographic ground advertisements

events.description: large holographic advertisement projection appears on the ground displaying colorful imagery
camera turns slightly to observe the holographic display and digital billboard on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking while observing the holographic ground advertisement and the 'Secure Your Soul' digital billboard on the building wall

entered.detail: large glowing holographic projection on the pavement showing colorful abstract imagery
large wall-mounted digital display with 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' text and Relic branding
street sign indicating speed limit 40 near the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a commercial zone featuring a prominent holographic advertisement projected onto the wet ground and a large 'Secure Your Soul' digital billboard on the right wall. The tunnel entrance becomes more prominent ahead, marked by intense red lighting and Arasaka corporate branding.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka branded tunnel underpass with intense red lighting

events.description: entering the tunnel underpass with walls covered in Arasaka branding and red neon lighting
lighting shifts to intense saturated red as camera descends deeper into the tunnel

agents.ego_description: descending into the red-lit Arasaka tunnel, passing corporate logos and illuminated wall text

entered.detail: linear fluorescent lights running along the tunnel ceiling
large illuminated Arasaka corporate logo painted on the tunnel wall
large 'ARASAKA' text logo on the tunnel wall
horizontal red neon light strips along the tunnel walls
orange and white striped barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow tunnel intensely lit with red neon lights and covered in Arasaka corporate branding. The environment becomes fully enclosed with no sky visibility. The camera descends slightly as it moves through the tunnel, passing illuminated wall logos and road barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground tunnel system with steam vents and intermittent open sections

events.description: briefly exiting the enclosed tunnel into a wider underpass area before re-entering another tunnel section
steam or fog becomes visible rising from vents in the tunnel floor

agents.ego_description: moving through the tunnel system, passing steam vents and continuing toward the distant tunnel exit

entered.detail: distant building with illuminated windows visible in the open underpass section
steam or fog rising from grates in the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the tunnel system, the camera briefly emerges into a wider underpass area with visible building windows before re-entering a red-lit tunnel section. Steam rises from floor vents as the camera progresses deeper into the underground corridor toward the distant exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open corporate plaza into the depths of a claustrophobic, red-lit underground tunnel system. It begins facing the glowing Arasaka logo before turning left onto a wet street, where the open air of the plaza gives way to a covered sidewalk lined by reflective glass buildings. As the camera moves beneath heavy overpasses through a hazy atmosphere, the scene shifts into a commercial zone featuring holographic ground advertisements and a large digital billboard. The environment then narrows and descends as the camera enters a fully enclosed tunnel saturated with intense red neon lighting and corporate branding. Finally, the path weaves through a wider underpass with rising steam from floor vents before plunging deeper into the subterranean corridor toward a distant exit.
